rowIssues.rawSource: OCR: '15m|*6포' — pipe character OCR artifact for lowercase 'l'
rowIssues.reason: Value is readable and understood; '|' is a common l/| OCR confusion. No handwriting cause suspected.

rowIssues.rawSource: OCR: '6OT' — letter O in place of digit 0; likely actual value is '60T'
rowIssues.reason: O/0 confusion in spec field. '60T' is standard Korean pharmaceutical tablet count (60정). Auto-correction risky — could affect downstream matching. warning_only for T-25b.

rowIssues.rawSource: OCR source: completely absent — no token found in manufacturing number column region
rowIssues.reason: Manufacturing number token is absent from the OCR raw text for this row. The corresponding column region likely had a handwritten mark (red circle/annotation) that made the printed value unreadable to OCR. Cannot auto-recover.

rowIssues.rawSource: OCR source: completely absent — no token found in expiry date column region
rowIssues.reason: Expiry date token is absent from the OCR raw text for this row. Same contamination region as manufacturingNo. Cannot auto-recover.

rowIssues.rawSource: OCR: '3OT' — letter O in place of digit 0; likely actual value is '30T'
rowIssues.reason: O/0 confusion in spec field. '30T' is standard Korean pharmaceutical tablet count. warning_only for T-25b.

rowIssues.rawSource: OCR source: completely absent — no token found in quantity column region. Raw OCR shows: '부스콘정5mg 3OT 23001A1-10ea 250202 2,790 27,900' — quantity token between expiryDate(250202) and unitPrice(2,790) is missing.
rowIssues.mathematicalVerification: 27,900 (amount) ÷ 2,790 (unitPrice) = 10 (exact) — mathematical inference suggests quantity=10, but auto-insertion is prohibited.
rowIssues.reason: Quantity token is absent from OCR raw text. Math verification confirms qty=10 from amount÷unitPrice but auto-insertion is not allowed. Red pen annotation likely covered the '10' in the quantity column.

rowIssues.rawSource: OCR raw: '301, 100' — space inserted after comma; actual value should be '301,100'
rowIssues.mathematicalVerification: 10 (qty) × 30,110 (unitPrice) = 301,100 — confirms '301,100' is correct; space is OCR artifact
rowIssues.reason: Space after thousands-separator comma is a consistent OCR artifact pattern. Pattern: '\d+,\s+\d{3}' → '\d+,\d{3}'. Safe to clean in T-25b. No value ambiguity.

rowIssues.rawSource: OCR raw: '782, 160' — space inserted after comma; actual value should be '782,160'
rowIssues.reason: Same pattern as row 19. Space after comma is OCR artifact from handwritten mark overlapping comma character area.

rowIssues.rawSource: OCR raw: '163, 100' — space inserted after comma; actual value should be '163,100'
OCR: '150mI' — capital I in place of lowercase 'l'; likely actual value is '150ml'
rowIssues.reason: l/I OCR confusion is a common artifact with no handwriting cause suspected. Value is readable. no_action.

rowIssues.rawSource: T10 parser result: '220, 890' — space after comma; actual value should be '220,890'
rowIssues.reason: Same pattern as rows 19, 20, 21. Space after comma OCR artifact.

issueTypeSummary.description: OCR raw source is completely absent for the field — no token detected in the column region. Likely caused by handwritten marks (red pen circles/annotations) covering the printed values.
issueTypeSummary.processingDirection: hold — no auto-recovery possible without OCR re-run on cleaned image

issueTypeSummary.description: O/0 character confusion in spec field. OCR read letter 'O' instead of digit '0'. Both '6OT'→'60T' and '3OT'→'30T' are suspected.
issueTypeSummary.processingDirection: warning_only — cannot auto-correct without higher confidence. Defer to T-25b.

issueTypeSummary.description: Amount field has a space inserted after the thousands-separator comma (e.g., '301, 100' instead of '301,100'). Consistent pattern across 4 rows suggests a handwritten mark (checkmark or circle) overlapping the comma area in the amount column. Math verification confirms all 4 are correct numeric values with the space removed.
issueTypeSummary.processingDirection: safe_numeric_cleanup_candidate — regex cleanup safe for T-25b

issueTypeSummary.description: Pipe character '|' OCR artifact for lowercase 'l' in spec field. Non-handwriting related.
Capital 'I' OCR artifact for lowercase 'l' in spec field. Non-handwriting related.

safe_numeric_cleanup_candidate.description: Amount fields with space after comma ('301, 100' → '301,100'). All 4 cases verified by quantity × unitPrice math.
safe_numeric_cleanup_candidate.riskAssessment: low — pattern is specific to comma-space-3digit, does not affect other numeric formats

warning_only_candidate.description: Spec fields with O/0 confusion ('6OT', '3OT'). Suspected values '60T', '30T'.
warning_only_candidate.riskAssessment: medium — cannot confirm without document reference

source_garbled_hold.description: Three fields where OCR source is completely absent. Row 4: manufacturingNo, expiryDate. Row 12: quantity.
source_garbled_hold.riskAssessment: high — any auto-correction would be a guess

redPenSuppressionAssessment.approach: HSV-based red channel masking (H: 0-15 or 160-180, S: >100, V: >50) → inpaint or whiten → re-OCR
redPenSuppressionAssessment.potentialBenefit: Could recover manufacturing number and expiry date for row 4, and quantity for row 12 if the handwritten marks are clearly separable from printed text
risks: Red rubber stamps/seals that are part of the document would also be erased
Red printed ink (company logos, document headers) may be affected
If red pen and printed text overlap in the same pixel region, both will be degraded
May introduce new regressions in rows that currently pass
redPenSuppressionAssessment.autoApplyDecision: PROHIBITED — invoice_statement is permanently excluded from preprocessing auto-apply per preprocessing_policy.py Rule 1
redPenSuppressionAssessment.debugVariantDecision: permitted as debug-only compare variant in T-25c

warningPolicy.trigger: any required column has < 100% fill rate across all rows
warningPolicy.currentState: manufacturingNo=96.4%, expiryDate=96.4%, quantity=96.4% — 1 row each missing
warningPolicy.proposedMessage: 일부 행에서 필수 컬럼 값이 비어 있습니다. 수기 오염 또는 OCR 인식 실패가 원인일 수 있습니다.

warningPolicy.trigger: row has itemName + mfg + exp + unitPrice + amount all filled, but quantity is empty
warningPolicy.proposedMessage: 수량 값이 비어 있으며, 수기 표시로 인한 OCR 누락이 의심됩니다. 금액/단가 비율로 수량=10을 추정할 수 있으나 자동 보정은 하지 않습니다.

warningPolicy.trigger: row has itemName + quantity + unitPrice + amount all filled, but manufacturingNo and expiryDate are both empty
warningPolicy.proposedMessage: 제조번호/유효기간 값이 비어 있으며, 수기 표시로 인한 OCR 누락이 의심됩니다. 수동 확인이 필요합니다.
금액 필드에 쉼표 뒤 공백이 감지되었습니다. 수기 표시로 인한 OCR 포매팅 오류일 수 있습니다. (예: '301, 100' → '301,100')

parserLayerAnalysis.contamination Layer: OCR source layer (pre-parser) — values are absent from OCR raw text before parser runs
parserLayerAnalysis.parserAdoption: parser correctly records empty string for missing tokens; does NOT invent values
parserLayerAnalysis.displayLayer: OcrResultPanel.tsx receives parser output as-is; no additional normalization for these cells
parserLayerAnalysis.normalizeTableCell: not involved — the issue is upstream (OCR tokenization), not display normalization
parserLayerAnalysis.valueOverride: none — parser does not override or fill missing required fields
parserLayerAnalysis.warningLayer: tableMeta.valueMappingWarnings is populated by _build_canonical_table_rows; currently only insuranceCode:ocr_source_missing is implemented
parserLayerAnalysis.addWarningImpact: adding new warning entries to valueMappingWarnings does NOT affect tableRows values or rowCount

columnStructureGuard.target: tableRows column keys must remain unchanged
columnStructureGuard.note: canonical _TABLE_ROW_COLUMNS preserved; no modification this turn

previewValidation.target: OcrResultPanel.tsx tableRows display, History tableRows detail, Custom/Validation panels
previewValidation.note: No code changed; display regression impossible

receiptRegressionGuard.note: invoice_statement analysis only; receipt parser not touched

typecheckBuild.required: only if code changes are made
typecheckBuild.note: No code changed in T-25; typecheck/build not required
